{{Quote|Would that Captain Kassler knew you were here, the miserly fool would storm the tower and try to rob you of profitable employment.|Pok Nar-Ten to [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="psg">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Pok Nar-Ten''' was a flashy [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] who worked for the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]], a proxy for [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] criminal activities. He was their representative on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Boztrok]].<ref name="psg" /> He operated from an imposing tower in Boztrok's [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]], with his heavily-[[Window/Legends|windowed]] main office halfway up, giving him a good view of his [[Cantina/Legends|cantina's]] main entrance. The cantina was but one of several businesses he owned there, which also included seven [[Hangar/Legends|docking bays]] and three tech hangars.<ref name="SWAJ11">{{JournalCite|11|Smuggler's Log}}</ref> He dressed in fine robes and sat on an ornate [[Greel wood/Legends|greel wood]] throne in his audience chamber. He was known not to tolerate failure in his employees and would have them all punished for their failure<ref name="psg" />

Nar-Ten employed the [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] [[Gjeel Dhantra]] as his [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] and [[Nazrita Villache]] as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. On behalf of his shadowy Hutt masters, he also recruited young [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] into the guild, offering them their own [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] on what seemed to be generous terms, in return for a few [[Standard year/Legends|years]] running cargo for the guild.

Among the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] he recruited in this way was young [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], giving her her first [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Brentaal Princess]]''. From the start, however, he ordered her to smuggle contraband through [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockades, and after being forced to drop two cargoes, she fell behind on payments to the guild. In response, Nar-Ten decided to claim Platt herself as payment for her debts, and sell her into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]—which may have been his real plan all along.

Although Platt subsequently made a successful run to [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], which she hoped would placate the Nimbanel, she was ambushed and apprehended there by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zo'Tannath]], working for Nar-Ten. The Nimbanel then seemed to have sold Okeefe to the [[Sludir]] slaver [[Quintik Kahr]].<ref name="psg" /> The smuggler later escaped from the slaver and named her next ship the ''[[Pok's Demise]]''. However, it is unknown if she ever got her revenge against the Nimbanel.<ref name="sot">{{GalaxyCite|10|Sandbound on Tatooine}}</ref>
